items.title: Nets destroy Kings 115-83. Sac at least got good games from draft picks Acuff and Sharp, who combined for more than half their points. As for Karaban .... yikes.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: Nets destroy Kings 115-83. Sac at least got good games from draft picks Acuff and Sharp, who combined for more than half their points. As for Karaban .... yikes.

items.author: James Ham

items.title: Sources: The Sacramento Kings will select Meleek Thomas with the No. 34 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Thomas and a 2032 Cavaliers second-round pick are being traded to the Cleveland Cavaliers as part of the Alex Karaban trade.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The Sacramento Kings will select Meleek Thomas with the No. 34 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Thomas and a 2032 Cavaliers second-round pick are being traded to the Cleveland Cavaliers as part of the Alex Karaban trade.
